item.description:
What's New in DockFlow 1.67

New Feature

  • App Notes – You can now add notes to your apps under App Configuration. Notes can be saved per-preset or set globally across all presets.

Major Improvements

  • Redesigned Settings – Settings has been completely reorganized into clearer sections: General, Presets & Switching, Hotkeys, Integrations, Lock Dock, Advanced, Backup & Restore, License, and Updates. Related options that were spread across multiple pages are now grouped together.
  • ExtraDock Visual Preview – The per-preset ExtraDock configuration now shows a visual preview of each dock's contents, including app icons, folders, and widgets. Hover over any icon to see its name.
  • ExtraDock Out of Beta – The ExtraDock integration is no longer marked as beta.
  • Cleaner Settings UI – Removed informational cards and "how it works" sections throughout settings for a much cleaner interface.
  • Lock Dock Status Display – Lock Dock now shows its status (Active / Off / Needs Permission) directly in the page header.
  • Smarter Lock Dock Behavior – Lock Dock now automatically moves the dock back to your chosen display after switching presets, connecting a display, or rearranging your screens.
  • Instant Lock Dock Updates – Changing the locked display in settings now moves the dock immediately instead of waiting for the next trigger.

Bug Fixes

  • Lock Dock Drag Protection – Lock Dock now blocks the dock from jumping to another display while dragging files or windows. Previously it only blocked regular mouse movement.
  • App List Refresh – The app list in the preset editor now refreshes immediately after closing the app settings.
  • ExtraDock Integration Fix – Fixed the integration with ExtraDock for users who own both apps. The screen now refreshes instantly when ExtraDock docks are added or modified.

Minor Improvements

  • Renamed: Backup & Restore – "Data Management" has been renamed to "Backup & Restore."
  • Renamed: Save Current Dock Shortcut – The "Update Last Applied Preset" shortcut action is now called "Save Current Dock to Last Applied Preset" for clarity.

Thank you for your continued support and feedback!
